title: Liverpool confident of signing Barcola - Thursday's gossip
summary: Liverpool are confident they will sign Bradley Barcola in a significant transfer move. The update is part of a wider round of transfer activity involving moves across the Premier League, including Alex Scott's potential switch to Arsenal and Bruno Fernandes' future at Manchester United.
content: Alex Scott favours a move to Arsenal, Bruno Fernandes is ready to commit his future to Manchester United, Liverpool are confident they will sign Bradley Barcola, plus more.

title: Saliba to miss extended period with back injury
summary: Arsenal defender William Saliba will miss an extended period after suffering a back injury while representing France at the World Cup. The injury represents a significant blow to Arsenal's defensive options during his absence.
content: Arsenal confirm defender William Saliba is set to miss an "extended period" after suffering a back injury while at the World Cup with France.

zh.title: 萨利巴因背伤将缺阵一段时间

title: Swansea sign New Zealand winger Just from Motherwell
summary: Swansea City have signed New Zealand winger Elijah Just from Scottish club Motherwell following an impressive World Cup campaign. Just scored three goals during the tournament, attracting the Championship club's attention.
content: Elijah Just joins the Championship club after scoring three goals during an impressive World Cup with New Zealand.

zh.title: 斯旺西从莫瑟韦尔签下新西兰边锋贾斯特

title: Wrexham win on Women's Champions League debut
summary: Wrexham Women secured a thrilling 4-2 victory against FC Pyunik in their UEFA Women's Champions League qualifying debut. The win marks a significant milestone for the club in European competition.

zh.title: 雷克瑟姆女足欧冠首战告捷

title: Villa agree loan deal for Chelsea winger Garnacho
summary: Aston Villa have secured a loan deal for Chelsea winger Alejandro Garnacho through the end of the 2026-27 season, with an obligation to buy. This move provides Villa with attacking reinforcement while allowing Chelsea to manage their squad. The deal reflects Villa's confidence in Garnacho's potential under their management.
content: Aston Villa agree a loan deal for Chelsea winger Alejandro Garnacho until the end of the 2026-27 season, with an obligation to buy.

zh.title: 阿斯顿维拉与切尔西达成加纳乔租借协议

title: Rangers to fight McInnes ban for 'disgusting' penalty remark
summary: Rangers manager Derek McInnes has received a four-match touchline ban for calling a penalty decision "disgusting," which the club intends to contest. The ban represents significant punishment for McInnes's comments about the refereeing decision. Rangers' decision to fight the ban indicates they view the punishment as excessive.
content: Rangers intend to contest a four-match touchline ban given to manager Derek McInnes for describing as "disgusting" the decision to award Celtic a late penalty at Motherwell in May.

zh.title: 流浪者队将上诉麦因内斯因"令人厌恶"点球言论的禁赛处罚

title: Inter Miami under investigation after signing Casemiro
summary: Major League Soccer is investigating Inter Miami for alleged tampering violations following their signing of Brazilian midfielder Casemiro. The investigation into the club's recruitment practices could result in disciplinary action if violations are confirmed. This highlights ongoing scrutiny of how MLS clubs conduct player signings.
content: Major League Soccer says it is investigating allegations of tampering by Inter Miami after the club signed Brazil midfielder Casemiro.

title: Burkina Faso, Mali and Niger launch bid for 2032 Afcon

The tripartite bid marks a rare partnership among the three countries for continental football hosting rights. The outcome could reshape where AFCON tournaments are held in the coming decade.
content: Burkina Faso, Mali and Niger - three countries led by military governments - submit a joint bid to host the 2032 Africa Cup of Nations.
